/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/openwarband.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openwarband.dir/src/campaign.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openwarband.dir/src/battle.cpp.o -o openwarband  _deps/raylib-build/raylib/libraylib.a -lm -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lm -ldl
